info.name: شركة المفتاح - توثيق Frontend
info.description:
# توثيق Frontend

## Base URL: {{baseUrl}}

## Headers:
- Accept: application/json
- Content-Type: application/json
- Authorization: Bearer {token}

## 1. المصادقة
- POST /auth/register
- POST /auth/login
- POST /auth/change-password

## 2. المناطق
- GET /regions/tree
- GET /regions/{id}/children

## 3. العقارات
- GET /properties (مع pagination)
- GET /properties/{id}
- GET /properties/advanced-search
- POST /properties

## 4. طلبات التواصل
- POST /contact
- GET /contact/my-requests
- GET /contact/my-received

## 5. الأدمن
- GET /admin/statistics
- POST /admin/properties/{id}/approve
- POST /admin/properties/{id}/reject
